spec_match.rationale: Successfully demonstrates the visibility state field representation in simulated timelines.

interactive.rationale: Timeline is interactive; clicking it dynamically updates the selected crash point, active visibility, background ratio, and outputs the JSON.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Matches the feature motivation to prioritize user-visible foreground incidents.

edge_cases.rationale: Re-generates random transitions properly and scopes the bounds between 0 and 60s safely.

references.rationale: References W3C Reporting API spec and ChromeStatus entry.

design_system.rationale: Utilizes beautiful green/red bands representing timeline states with high visibility contrast.

summary: Creative interactive timeline representation demonstrating exactly when/where a crash could occur on a backgrounded tab.
